[30;1m205 | [0m[35mIf brace expansion is not disabled, then it is performed before any[0m
[30;1m206 | [0m[35mother interpretation of the glob pattern.  Thus, a pattern like[0m
[30;1m207 | [0m[35m`+(a|{b),c)}`, which would not be valid in bash or zsh, is expanded[0m
[30;1m208 | [0m[35m**first** into the set of `+(a|b)` and `+(a|c)`, and those patterns are[0m
[30;1m209 | [0m[35mchecked for validity.  Since those two are valid, matching proceeds.[0m

[30;1m303 | [0m[35mIf brace expansion is not disabled, then it is performed before any[0m
[30;1m304 | [0m[35mother interpretation of the glob pattern.  Thus, a pattern like[0m
[30;1m305 | [0m[35m`+(a|{b),c)}`, which would not be valid in bash or zsh, is expanded[0m

[30;1m307 | [0m[35mchecked for validity.  Since those two are valid, matching proceeds.[0m

[30;1m253 | [0m[35m* `debug` Set to enable debug logging in minimatch and glob.[0m

[30;1m35 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m36 | [0m[35m### Unix Like Operating Systems[0m
[30;1m37 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m38 | [0m[35mWe look at the environment variables `LC_ALL`, `LC_CTYPE`, and `LANG` in[0m
[30;1m39 | [0m[35mthat order.  For `LC_ALL` and `LANG`, it looks for `.UTF-8` in the value. [0m
[30;1m40 | [0m[35mFor `LC_CTYPE` it looks to see if the value is `UTF-8`.  This is sufficient[0m
[30;1m41 | [0m[35mfor most POSIX systems.  While locale data can be put in `/etc/locale.conf`[0m

[31m--[ [0m[34mMatch #[0m[33m729[0m[34m of [0m[33m1114[0m[31m ]--[0m
   Rule Id: [34mBD000600[0m

  Severity: [36mModerate[0m, Confidence: [36mLow[0m

   Pattern: [32m\s(advpack\.dll|appvlp|at|atbroker|bash|bginfo|bitsadmin|cdb|certutil|cl_invocation\.ps1|cl_mutexverifiers\.ps1|cmd|cmdkey|cmstp|comsvcs\.dll|control|csc|cscript|csi|devtoolslauncher|dfsvc|diskshadow|dnscmd|dnx|dotnet|dxcap|esentutl|eventvwr|excel|expand|extexport|extrac32|findstr|forfiles|ftp|gfxdownloadwrapper|gpscript|hh|ie4uinit|ieadvpack\.dll|ieaframe\.dll|ic|infdefaultinstall|installutil|jsc|makecab|manage-bde\.wsf|mavinject|mftrace|microsoft\.workflow\.compiler|mmc|msbuild|msconfig|msdeploy|msdt|mshta|mshtml\.dll|msc|msxsl|netsh|odbcconf|pcalua|pcwrun|pcwutl\.dll|pester\.bat|powerpnt|presentationhost|pubprn\.vbs|rcsi|reg|regasm|regedit|register-cimprovider|regsvcs|regsvr32|rpcping|rundll32|runonce|runscripthelper|sc|schtasks|scriptrunner|setupapi\.dll|shdocvw\.dll|shell32\.dll|slmgr\.vbs|sqldumper|sqlps|sqltoolsps|squirrel|syncappvpublishingserver|syncappvpublishingserver\.vbs|syssetup\.dll|te|tracker|tttracer|update|url\.dll|verclsid|vsjitdebugger|wab|winrm\.vbs|winword|wmic|wscript|wsl|wsreset|xwizard|zipfldr\.dll)\s[0m

[30;1m27 | [0m[35m### Windows[0m
[30;1m28 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m29 | [0m[35mSince at least Windows 7, `cmd` and `powershell` have been unicode capable,[0m
[30;1m30 | [0m[35mbut unfortunately even then it's not guaranteed. In many localizations it[0m
[30;1m31 | [0m[35mstill uses legacy code pages and there's no facility short of running[0m
[30;1m32 | [0m[35mprograms or linking C++ that will let us detect this. As such, we[0m
